series_metadata.series_title: Board of Executives of Long-Term Services & Supports (BELTSS) meeting minutes.
series_metadata.series_description: The Board has meeting minutes from past meetings in paper format.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Board Meeting Minutes will be kept in paper form a period of . Once 20-year period is reached, meeting minutes will be scanned and transferred State Archives. ; Electronic: Board Meeting Minutes will be kept in electronic form a period of . Once 20-year period is reached, meeting minutes will be deleted
